define dso_local i32 @sum_to_n(i32 %n) #0 {
entry:
  ; Initialize sum and i
  %sum = alloca i32, align 4
  %i = alloca i32, align 4
  store i32 0, i32* %sum, align 4
  store i32 0, i32* %i, align 4

  ; Branch to the loop condition
  br label %loop_cond

loop_cond:
  ; Load i and n
  %i_val = load i32, i32* %i, align 4
  %n_val = load i32, i32* %n, align 4

  ; Check if i < n
  %cond = icmp slt i32 %i_val, %n_val
  br i1 %cond, label %loop_body, label %exit

loop_body:
  ; Load sum and i
  %sum_val = load i32, i32* %sum, align 4
  %i_val = load i32, i32* %i, align 4

  ; Update sum
  %new_sum = add i32 %sum_val, %i_val
  store i32 %new_sum, i32* %sum, align 4

  ; Increment i
  %new_i = add i32 %i_val, 1
  store i32 %new_i, i32* %i, align 4

  ; Branch back to the loop condition
  br label %loop_cond

exit:
  ; Load the final value of sum
  %final_sum = load i32, i32* %sum, align 4

  ; Return the final value of sum
  ret i32 %final_sum
}

define i32 @factorial(i32 %n) {
entry:
  ; Initialize result to 1
  %result = alloca i32
  store i32 1, i32* %result

  ; Initialize i to 1
  %i = alloca i32
  store i32 1, i32* %i

  ; Branch to the loop condition
  br label %loop_condition

loop_condition:
  ; Load the current value of i
  %i_val = load i32, i32* %i

  ; Check if i <= n
  %cmp = icmp sle i32 %i_val, %n

  ; If true, go to the loop body, otherwise exit
  br i1 %cmp, label %loop_body, label %exit

loop_body:
  ; Load the current values of result and i
  %result_val = load i32, i32* %result
  %i_val = load i32, i32* %i

  ; Update result = result * i
  %new_result = mul i32 %result_val, %i_val
  store i32 %new_result, i32* %result

  ; Increment i
  %new_i = add i32 %i_val, 1
  store i32 %new_i, i32* %i

  ; Branch back to the loop condition
  br label %loop_condition

exit:
  ; Load the final value of result
  %final_result = load i32, i32* %result

  ; Return the final result
  ret i32 %final_result
}

entry:

define i32 @array_sum(ptr %arr, i32 %n) {
entry:
  %sum = alloca i32
  %i = alloca i32
  store i32 0, i32* %sum
  store i32 0, i32* %i

loop:
  %i.val = load i32, i32* %i
  %cmp = icmp slt i32 %i.val, %n
  br i1 %cmp, label %body, label %exit

body:
  %i.val2 = load i32, i32* %i
  %idx = mul i32 %i.val2, 4
  %ptr = getelementptr i32, ptr %arr, i32 %i.val2
  %val = load i32, i32* %ptr
  %sum.val = load i32, i32* %sum
  %new.sum = add i32 %sum.val, %val
  store i32 %new.sum, i32* %sum
  %i.next = add i32 %i.val2, 1
  store i32 %i.next, i32* %i
  br label %loop

exit:
  %sum.final = load i32, i32* %sum
  ret i32 %sum.final
}

define i32 @manhattan_distance(ptr %p1, ptr %p2) {
entry:
  %dx = load i32, ptr %p1, align 4
  %dx1 = load i32, ptr %p2, align 4
  %dx2 = sub i32 %dx, %dx1
  store i32 %dx2, ptr %dx, align 4
  %dy = load i32, ptr %p1, align 4
  %dy1 = load i32, ptr %p2, align 4
  %dy2 = sub i32 %dy, %dy1
  store i32 %dy2, ptr %dy, align 4
  %dx3 = load i32, ptr %dx, align 4
  %dx4 = icmp slt i32 %dx3, 0
  br i1 %dx4, label %if.then, label %if.end

if.then:
  %dx5 = load i32, ptr %dx, align 4
  %dx6 = sub i32 0, %dx5
  store i32 %dx6, ptr %dx, align 4
  br label %if.end

if.end:
  %dy3 = load i32, ptr %dy, align 4
  %dy4 = icmp slt i32 %dy3, 0
  br i1 %dy4, label %if.then1, label %if.end1

if.then1:
  %dy5 = load i32, ptr %dy, align 4
  %dy6 = sub i32 0, %dy5
  store i32 %dy6, ptr %dy, align 4
  br label %if.end1

if.end1:
  %dx7 = load i32, ptr %dx, align 4
  %dy7 = load i32, ptr %dy, align 4
  %sum = add i32 %dx7, %dy7
  ret i32 %sum
}

define i32 @manhattan_distance(ptr %p1, ptr %p2) {
entry:
  %p1.x.ptr = getelementptr %struct.Point, ptr %p1, i32 0, i32 0
  %p1.x = load i32, ptr %p1.x.ptr
  %p2.x.ptr = getelementptr %struct.Point, ptr %p2, i32 0, i32 0
  %p2.x = load i32, ptr %p2.x.ptr
  %dx = sub i32 %p1.x, %p2.x

  %p1.y.ptr = getelementptr %struct.Point, ptr %p1, i32 0, i32 1
  %p1.y = load i32, ptr %p1.y.ptr
  %p2.y.ptr = getelementptr %struct.Point, ptr %p2, i32 0, i32 1
  %p2.y = load i32, ptr %p2.y.ptr
  %dy = sub i32 %p1.y, %p2.y

  %dx.neg = icmp slt i32 %dx, 0
  %dx.abs = sub i32 0, %dx
  %dx.final = select i1 %dx.neg, i32 %dx.abs, i32 %dx

  %dy.neg = icmp slt i32 %dy, 0
  %dy.abs = sub i32 0, %dy
  %dy.final = select i1 %dy.neg, i32 %dy.abs, i32 %dy

  %result = add i32 %dx.final, %dy.final
  ret i32 %result
}

define void @bubble_sort(ptr %arr, i32 %n) {
entry:
    %n_minus_1 = sub i32 %n, 1
    br label %outer_loop

outer_loop:
    %i = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %i_next, %inner_loop_end ]
    %cmp_i = icmp slt i32 %i, %n_minus_1
    br i1 %cmp_i, label %inner_loop, label %outer_loop_end

inner_loop:
    %n_minus_i_minus_1 = sub i32 %n, %i
    %n_minus_i_minus_2 = sub i32 %n_minus_i_minus_1, 1
    %j = phi i32 [ 0, %outer_loop ], [ %j_next, %inner_loop_body ]
    %cmp_j = icmp slt i32 %j, %n_minus_i_minus_2
    br i1 %cmp_j, label %inner_loop_body, label %inner_loop_end

inner_loop_body:
    %arr_j = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %arr, i32 %j
    %arr_j_val = load i32, ptr %arr_j
    %arr_j_plus_1 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %arr, i32 %j_plus_1
    %arr_j_plus_1_val = load i32, ptr %arr_j_plus_1
    %cmp_arr = icmp sgt i32 %arr_j_val, %arr_j_plus_1_val
    br i1 %cmp_arr, label %swap, label %inner_loop_continue

swap:
    %tmp = alloca i32
    store i32 %arr_j_val, ptr %tmp
    store i32 %arr_j_plus_1_val, ptr %arr_j
    %tmp_val = load i32, ptr %tmp
    store i32 %tmp_val, ptr %arr_j_plus_1
    br label %inner_loop_continue

inner_loop_continue:
    %j_next = add i32 %j, 1
    br label %inner_loop

inner_loop_end:
    %i_next = add i32 %i, 1
    br label %outer_loop

outer_loop_end:
    ret void
}

    br label %inner_loop_continue

    br label %inner_loop

inner_loop_end:

    br label %outer_loop

    ret void
}

inner.cond:

  %cmp.inner = icmp slt i32 %j, %inner.limit
  br i1 %cmp.inner, label %inner.body, label %outer.inc

inner.body:
  %j.ext = sext i32 %j to i64
  %ptr.j = getelementptr i32, ptr %arr, i64 %j.ext
  %val.j = load i32, ptr %ptr.j
  %j1 = add i32 %j, 1

  br label %inner.inc

inner.inc:
  %j.next = add i32 %j, 1
  br label %inner.cond

outer.inc:
  %i.next = add i32 %i, 1
  br label %outer.cond

exit:
  ret void

original_ir:
; Define the structure for Node
%Node = type { i32, ptr }

; Define the function
define i32 @list_length(ptr %head) {
entry:
    ; Initialize count to 0
    %count = alloca i32
    store i32 0, i32* %count
    
    ; Initialize current to head
    %current = alloca ptr
    store ptr %head, ptr* %current
    
    ; Branch to the loop condition
    br label %loop_condition

loop_condition:
    ; Load current
    %current_val = load ptr, ptr* %current
    
    ; Check if current is null
    %is_null = icmp eq ptr %current_val, null
    br i1 %is_null, label %exit, label %loop_body

loop_body:
    ; Load count
    %count_val = load i32, i32* %count
    
    ; Increment count
    %new_count = add i32 %count_val, 1
    store i32 %new_count, i32* %count
    
    ; Load current
    %current_val = load ptr, ptr* %current
    
    ; Get the next node
    %next_node = getelementptr inbounds %Node, ptr %current_val, i32 1
    %next_node_val = load ptr, ptr* %next_node
    
    ; Store the next node as current
    store ptr %next_node_val, ptr* %current
    
    ; Branch back to the loop condition
    br label %loop_condition

exit:
    ; Load the final count
    %final_count = load i32, i32* %count
    
    ; Return the final count
    ret i32 %final_count
}
